descriptions: Added a new Compass module and a 5-second Seatbelt Alarm system.
Converted seatbelt and alarm sounds to 3D spatial audio for all vehicle occupants.
Fixed the minimap visibility bug that kept the radar on-screen while on foot.
Improved the Settings Reset logic to prioritize Server Presets over defaults.
Added ESC key support for closing the UI and enabled HSL color config overrides.
Added Config.useCustomMask for greater minimap customization.
